title: Tools, workflow, and systems.
intro: This is the stack and setup behind how I build across web, app, interface, and systems-oriented work. It is less about listing tools and more about showing how the pieces fit together when turning ideas into polished builds.

items.name: HTML
items.description: Base structure for web pages, content hierarchy, and semantic layout.

items.name: CSS
items.description: Core styling layer for layout, spacing, responsiveness, and visual presentation.

items.name: JavaScript
items.description: Core language for browser logic, interactivity, and full-stack JavaScript workflows.

items.name: Next.js
items.description: Main web framework used for the portfolio and full-stack product interfaces.

items.name: React
items.description: Component-driven UI library behind much of the interactive frontend work.

items.name: Tailwind
items.description: Utility-first styling system for building polished interfaces quickly and consistently.

items.name: React Native
items.description: Cross-platform mobile app framework for product, app, and interface experiments.

items.name: Expo
items.description: Development layer that speeds up React Native workflows and iteration.

items.name: Swift
items.description: Used for native Apple-side experimentation and app/game-oriented work.

items.name: Node.js
items.description: JavaScript runtime used for backend logic, tooling, and full-stack workflows.

items.name: Supabase
items.description: Backend layer for auth, database, storage, and modern app services.

items.name: PostgreSQL
items.description: Relational database layer behind structured application data.

items.name: Docker
items.description: Containerization for consistent environments, services, and deployments.

items.name: Kubernetes
items.description: Orchestration layer for deeper infra-oriented deployment work.

items.name: TypeScript
items.description: Shared typed language across frontend, app, backend, and UI logic.

items.name: Git
items.description: Version control foundation for maintaining code history and collaborative workflows.

items.name: GitHub
items.description: Code hosting, collaboration, and project versioning platform.

items.name: Terminal UX
items.description: Terminal-first interaction layer and workspace concept behind this portfolio.

items.name: UI/UX Design
items.description: Interface thinking around hierarchy, clarity, flow, and interaction polish.

items.name: Framer Motion
items.description: Animation layer for smooth, expressive, and polished UI interactions.

items.name: Figma
items.description: Tool for layout planning, UI exploration, and visual system thinking.

items.name: VS Code
items.description: Primary general-purpose code editor for development and iteration.

items.name: Xcode
items.description: Apple development environment used for native app and Swift work.

items.name: Neovim
items.description: Keyboard-driven editing environment and workflow experimentation.

items.name: DevOps
items.description: Workflow mindset around deployment, automation, consistency, and shipping systems properly.

items.name: CI/CD
items.description: Automation pipeline thinking for testing, integration, and deployment workflows.

items.name: Game Dev
items.description: Experimental area combining systems design, interaction, performance, and creative problem solving.

items.name: Content / Writing
items.description: Writing and articulation layer for documenting process, ideas, and learnings.
